Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually occurs

Name: Average duration of the period starting with First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and ending with the next occurrence of Manuscript Export Succeeded

Name: Total elapsed time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that include both activities

Name: Minimum time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and First Look-Your updates are overdue in variants where both appear

Name: Average cycle time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation measured from its occurrence to the next Manuscript Export Succeeded
